state.coderResponse:
All checks confirmed. Let me provide the final result.

## Summary

Successfully implemented **P1.M6.T1.S1** — the two-nested-loop snapshot-based atomic-commit orchestrator and its two supporting seams.

### Files created/modified

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `internal/provider/executor.go` | **ADDITIVE** — exported `func (e *Executor) Parse(raw string, m Manifest) (string, bool)` (one-line pass-through over package-private `parseOutput`) |
| `internal/git/plumbing.go` | **ADDITIVE** — read-only `func (g *Git) DiffTreeNameStatus(sha string) (string, error)` running `git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-status -r <sha>` |
| `internal/git/plumbing_test.go` | **ADDED** two cases: `ReturnsNameStatusLines` (byte-exact cross-check) + `IsReadOnly` (§18.1) |
| `internal/generate/generate.go` | **NEW** — owns `// Package generate`; defines `gitClient`+`runner` interfaces (structurally satisfied by `*git.Git`/`*provider.Executor`), `Deps`, `Result`, the 3 sentinel errors, and `CommitStaged` |
| `internal/generate/generate_test.go` | **NEW** — white-box tests with `stubGit`+`stubRunner` (no testify, stdlib+internal only) |

### Verification against success criteria
- **Two-nested-loop counting EXACT**: outer `dupAttempt <= MaxDuplicateRetries` (inclusive), inner fresh 2-try budget — proven by `DupExhaustion` asserting **exactly** `MaxDuplicateRetries+1` (=4) Run calls.
- **Corrective retry keeps diff** (`AssemblePayload`), swaps instruction slot, resets each outer iter — proven by `ParseRetryThenSuccess` payload assertions.
- **Returns sentinels, never `os.Exit`** (verified by grep); **never stages** (no `AddAll`/`HasStagedChanges`).
- **Candidate rules**: `msg` only on dup-exhaustion, `""` elsewhere; signal-cancel returns `ErrRescue` *without* Rescue (double-rescue guard).
- **WriteTree error returned directly** (not `ErrRescue`); empty diff → `ErrNothingToCommit` (no WriteTree, no Rescue).
- **Signal wiring**: `installSignalHandler` after WriteTree, `restoreSignalHandler` immediately **before** UpdateRefCAS (Gotcha #1).
- **Root commit**: CommitTree/UpdateRefCAS called with `""` (omits `-p`, 1-arg CAS).
- **FR42 success block** printed to stdout; `ErrHeadMoved` prints §13.5 message, never `--force`.
- Compile-time assertions (`var _ gitClient = (*git.Git)(nil)`, `var _ runner = (*provider.Executor)(nil)`) guard against interface drift.
- `parse.go`, `parse_test.go`, `manifest.go`, `dedupe.go`, `rescue.go`, `signal.go` all **untouched**.

All 6 validation gates pass: build, vet, gofmt, CommitStaged unit tests, git+provider regression, and full module (`go test ./...`).

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Implemented P1.M6.T1.S1. Created internal/generate/generate.go (owns // Package generate; defines gitClient+runner consumer interfaces, Deps, Result, three sentinel errors ErrNothingToCommit/ErrRescue/ErrHeadMoved, and CommitStaged implementing the exact two-nested-loop snapshot-based atomic-commit contract per decisions.md §3). Added the two additive seams: (*provider.Executor).Parse in executor.go (one-line pass-through over package-private parseOutput) and git.DiffTreeNameStatus in plumbing.go (read-only FR42 success-print query). Created generate_test.go (white-box, stubGit+stubRunner, no testify) covering all 11 cases: happy-path, dup-retry-then-success, parse-retry-then-success, parse-fail-after-inner, dup-exhaustion (asserting exactly MaxDuplicateRetries+1 Run calls), nothing-to-commit, WriteTree-error, timeout, signal-cancel (no double-rescue), head-moved, and root-commit; plus plumbing_test.go cases for DiffTreeNameStatus. Compile-time assertions confirm *git.Git and *provider.Executor satisfy the interfaces structurally. All validation gates pass: go build ./internal/..., go vet ./internal/..., gofmt clean, go test ./internal/generate/ -run CommitStaged (11/11), go test ./internal/git/ ./internal/provider/, and go test ./.... No os.Exit, no staging, no testify; parse.go/manifest.go/dedupe.go/rescue.go/signal.go untouched."
}
```

| `internal/provider/executor.go` | **ADDITIVE** — exported `func (e *Executor) Parse(raw string, m Manifest) (string, bool)` (one-line pass-through over package-private `parseOutput`) |
| `internal/git/plumbing.go` | **ADDITIVE** — read-only `func (g *Git) DiffTreeNameStatus(sha string) (string, error)` running `git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-status -r <sha>` |
| `internal/git/plumbing_test.go` | **ADDED** two cases: `ReturnsNameStatusLines` (byte-exact cross-check) + `IsReadOnly` (§18.1) |
| `internal/generate/generate.go` | **NEW** — owns `// Package generate`; defines `gitClient`+`runner` interfaces (structurally satisfied by `*git.Git`/`*provider.Executor`), `Deps`, `Result`, the 3 sentinel errors, and `CommitStaged` |
| `internal/generate/generate_test.go` | **NEW** — white-box tests with `stubGit`+`stubRunner` (no testify, stdlib+internal only) |

### Verification against success criteria
- **Two-nested-loop counting EXACT**: outer `dupAttempt <= MaxDuplicateRetries` (inclusive), inner fresh 2-try budget — proven by `DupExhaustion` asserting **exactly** `MaxDuplicateRetries+1` (=4) Run calls.
- **Corrective retry keeps diff** (`AssemblePayload`), swaps instruction slot, resets each outer iter — proven by `ParseRetryThenSuccess` payload assertions.
- **Returns sentinels, never `os.Exit`** (verified by grep); **never stages** (no `AddAll`/`HasStagedChanges`).
- **Candidate rules**: `msg` only on dup-exhaustion, `""` elsewhere; signal-cancel returns `ErrRescue` *without* Rescue (double-rescue guard).
- **WriteTree error returned directly** (not `ErrRescue`); empty diff → `ErrNothingToCommit` (no WriteTree, no Rescue).
- **Signal wiring**: `installSignalHandler` after WriteTree, `restoreSignalHandler` immediately **before** UpdateRefCAS (Gotcha #1).
- **Root commit**: CommitTree/UpdateRefCAS called with `""` (omits `-p`, 1-arg CAS).
- **FR42 success block** printed to stdout; `ErrHeadMoved` prints §13.5 message, never `--force`.
- Compile-time assertions (`var _ gitClient = (*git.Git)(nil)`, `var _ runner = (*provider.Executor)(nil)`) guard against interface drift.
- `parse.go`, `parse_test.go`, `manifest.go`, `dedupe.go`, `rescue.go`, `signal.go` all **untouched**.

All 6 validation gates pass: build, vet, gofmt, CommitStaged unit tests, git+provider regression, and full module (`go test ./...`).
